name: Stagger the delay of multiple animations - Motion.dev
snippet: A stagger animation delays each element in a group by a fixed amount, creating a cascading, wave, or ripple effect. How do I stagger from a different origin?

name: Staggering - NoSleepCreative Wiki
snippet: Staggering animation is one of the most common technique used in Motion Design. keyframes from one layer to another and offset the timing.
